name: cosign-sign
description: Sigstore cosign — container/artifact signing (validated via cosign sign-blob with a local ED25519 key).
title: cosign-sign

llmHints.on_match: cosign sign observed. Signature + transparency log entry in Rekor (or local detached signature for sign-blob).

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "cosign sign"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
